strategy.description: Reduce position sizes. Prefer mean-reversion and range-bound strategies. Be very selective — quality over quantity.

picks.name: State Street Corporation
picks.buy_reason: Valuation: Trading at trailing P/E of 13.0x, forward P/E of 9.4x (indicating earnings acceleration), P/B of 1.40x, well below sector averages. This suggests the market is underpricing the company's earnings power and asset base. Fundamentals: Revenue growing at 8% year-over-year, profit margins of 21% demonstrating operational efficiency. The combination of growth and profitability indicates a business with sustainable competitive advantages and strong pricing power. Technical picture: Price remains above the 200-day moving average, confirming the long-term structural uptrend is intact, and pulled back below the 50-day SMA while the 200-day uptrend remains intact — a potential mean-reversion entry opportunity, RSI bullish divergence detected, suggesting downside momentum is fading while the price prepares for a reversal. Risk/reward: Entry zone $121.04–$124.20 with a target of $140.34 (+15.0% upside) against a stop loss at $116.71 (-4.4% risk), yielding a 3.4:1 reward-to-risk ratio. Recommended holding period: 4-8 months.
